config.title: AI Translate Configuration
config.modelType.desc: Select AI model type (currently only OpenAI compatible mode is supported)
config.largeModelApi.desc: OpenAI compatible API endpoint (default: https://api.openai.com/v1). Supports DeepSeek, OpenRouter, and other OpenAI-compatible services.
config.largeModelKey.desc: API Key for the selected service
config.largeModelMaxTokens.desc: Maximum number of tokens to generate (1-4096)
config.largeModelTemperature.desc: Sampling temperature (0-1). Lower values produce more deterministic results, higher values produce more creative results.
config.streaming.desc: Enable streaming response for faster display
config.namingRules.desc: Naming convention for AI-generated variable/function names
config.namingRules.default: Default: Let AI automatically determine based on language patterns
config.aiTranslate.customTranslatePrompt: Custom translation prompt template. Must include ${targetLang} and ${content} placeholders.
config.aiTranslate.customNamingPrompt: Custom naming prompt template. Must include ${variableName}, ${paragraph}, and ${languageId} placeholders.
config.aiTranslate.streaming: Enable streaming response for real-time translation display
config.aiTranslate.aiNaming: AI Naming: Generate English names for variables, functions, and classes
config.aiTranslate.filterThinkingContent: Filter out thinking/reasoning content from models like DeepSeek-R1
config.aiTranslate.problemTranslateLang: Translate problem panel diagnostics (errors, warnings) to selected language. 'none' disables translation.
command.aiNaming.title: AI Naming
command.aiNaming.desc: Generate English variable/function/class names using AI
